title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.535 - Fees for naturalization
text:
483.535.  Fees for naturalization. — The clerks of courts in this state authorized by law to grant naturalization papers shall charge and collect court costs in such amounts as are determined pursuant to sections 488.010 to 488.020*.
(RSMo 1939 § 13410, A.L. 1996 S.B. 869) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11788; 1919 § 10997; 1909 § 10700 
Effective 7-01-97 
*Words "section 514.015" appear in original rolls, which was changed to effectuate the court cost bill.
